name: moto-math-variant
description: MOTO Autonomous ASI - multi-agent autonomous research and rigorous solution generation with optional Lean 4 proof verification

scripts.dev:backend: python -c "import os, uvicorn; uvicorn.run('backend.api.main:app', host=os.getenv('MOTO_BACKEND_HOST', os.getenv('HOST', '0.0.0.0')), port=int(os.getenv('MOTO_BACKEND_PORT', os.getenv('PORT', '8000'))), reload=True, access_log=False)"
scripts.test:workflows: python -m pytest tests/workflow_scenarios tests/workflow_recombinatory tests/workflow_real_adapters tests/workflow_cross_field
scripts.test:context-overflow: python -m pytest tests/regressions/test_context_overflow_metadata.py tests/regressions/test_context_overflow_emitters.py tests/regressions/test_provider_routing_errors.py tests/regressions/test_proof_context_overflow_metadata.py && npm --prefix frontend run test -- src/utils/activityStyles.test.js src/components/contextOverflowBehavior.test.jsx
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend

author: Intrafere LLC
